MASTER SERVICES AGREEMENT

This Master Services Agreement is entered into as of January 15, 2024 by and between Alpha Systems, Inc., a Delaware corporation ("Licensor") and Beta Operations LLC, a Texas limited liability company ("Licensee").

"Software" means the hosted workflow orchestration platform provided by Licensor.

The term shall begin on the Effective Date and continue until January 14, 2025 for twelve months.
Licensor shall provide remote onboarding sessions, administrator training materials, and standard email support during Licensor's normal business hours.
Licensee shall pay all undisputed fees within thirty days of invoice receipt.
This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the State of Delaware.
Either party may terminate this Agreement for material breach upon thirty days written notice.
